channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Heads up! The Galaxy Watch 8 Classic just scored a $130 discount during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is live, and you can already score a straight 26% off the Galaxy Watch 8 Classic if you place your order today.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: A close-up of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic on a woman's wrist showing the Heritage Classic watch face.
media:content.media:text: A close-up of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic on a woman's wrist showing the Heritage Classic watch face.
media:content.media:title: A close-up of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic on a woman's wrist showing the Heritage Classic watch face.

item.title: The Moto Razr Ultra specs for 2026 might be more interesting after this leak
item.description: This could be your first look at the Moto Razr Ultra 2026, as a rumor surfaced with its design and speculation on key specs.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode

item.title: This one's for you, Galaxy S24: Samsung drops its One UI 8.5 beta on past-gen Galaxy devices
item.description: Older Galaxy phones, like the Galaxy S24, finally received One UI 8.5 beta access.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway
media:content.media:text: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway
media:content.media:title: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway

item.title: One big Google Translate update made its way onto iOS amidst an Android expansion
item.description: Shattering language barriers became a lot easier, as Google Translate's Live Translate greets iOS users and more Android users in other countries.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Translate offers practice modes, speech-to-speech translations, and more.
media:content.media:text: Google Translate offers practice modes, speech-to-speech translations, and more.
media:content.media:title: Google Translate offers practice modes, speech-to-speech translations, and more.

item.title: This is absolutely the one smartphone I would buy right now during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Razr Ultra 2025 is available for $799 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, a $500 discount from the phone's original launch price.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 with a ring around the cover screen
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2025 with a ring around the cover screen
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2025 with a ring around the cover screen

item.title: Forget Amazon, this Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra deal comes with $920 of potential savings
item.description: Buy the Galaxy S26 Ultra directly from the source and you'll be eligible for major trade-in savings, free storage upgrades, and more.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: The OnePlus 15R just got a rare discount for the Big Spring Sale, but is the phone actually worth it?
item.description: The OnePlus 15R was a little disappointing on arrival, but it still has a lot to offer.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: OnePlus 15R review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OnePlus 15R review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OnePlus 15R review on Android Central

item.title: As part of the Big Spring Sale, Amazon has launched a $150 discount on our favorite e-reader for writing
item.description: The Kindle Scribe is perfect for bookworms who like to take notes.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Amazon Kindle Scribe on desk
media:content.media:text: Amazon Kindle Scribe on desk
media:content.media:title: Amazon Kindle Scribe on desk

item.title: WhatsApp’s big update fixes the three things users have been yelling about for years
item.description: WhatsApp finally fixes key annoyances with multi-account support, better storage tools, and easy phone transfers.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Whatsapp logo
media:content.media:text: Whatsapp logo
media:content.media:title: Whatsapp logo

item.title: No way! Amazon is basically handing you $100 back on the Galaxy S26 right now
item.description: The promotion makes Samsung's $900 flagship more affordable.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Display of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra showing the One UI home screen
media:content.media:text: Display of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra showing the One UI home screen
media:content.media:title: Display of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra showing the One UI home screen

item.title: OPPO's Reno 15 Pro and Reno 15 are the flagship killers you deserve in 2026
item.description: With the Reno 15 Pro, OPPO is delivering one of the best all-round devices in the mid-range segment. The standard Reno 15 is just as good, and these are terrific devices if you need an upgrade in 2026.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: OPPO Reno 15 Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OPPO Reno 15 Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OPPO Reno 15 Pro review on Android Central

item.title: Take a breath: purported Oura Ring 5 design details appear, but nothing is set in stone
item.description: Could this be the Oura Ring 5? Early rumors claimed this is what might take place during its eventual launch.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic next to the Oura app
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic next to the Oura app
media:content.media:title: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic next to the Oura app

item.title: The best mid-range Fitbit just scored 25% OFF during the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Fitbit Versa 4 is great for those who don't need the upgraded Pixel Watch.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Set up Alexa screen on Fitbit Versa 4
media:content.media:text: Set up Alexa screen on Fitbit Versa 4
media:content.media:title: Set up Alexa screen on Fitbit Versa 4

item.title: I found the 5 best Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 features you probably aren't using
item.description: The new Galaxy Buds 4 are here, and they come with a handful of helpful software features that work best with Samsung phones.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Galaxy Buds 4 alongside their companion app.
media:content.media:text: The Galaxy Buds 4 alongside their companion app.
media:content.media:title: The Galaxy Buds 4 alongside their companion app.

item.title: Galaxy S26 who? The Pixel 10 is back down to one of its lowest prices since launch
item.description: The Pixel 10 is on sale during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, taking it down to one of its lowest prices since launch.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10
media:content.media:text: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10
media:content.media:title: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10

item.title: Jury finds Meta, YouTube 'negligent' in trial over addictive social media
item.description: Meta, YouTube trial over addictive social media apps led to each being found guilty of "negligence."
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Meta logo on an Honor Magic V5 foldable phone
media:content.media:text: The Meta logo on an Honor Magic V5 foldable phone
media:content.media:title: The Meta logo on an Honor Magic V5 foldable phone

item.title: These legendary Sennheiser headphones are a ridiculous 56% OFF during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Sennheiser Momentum 4 may be last-gen, but slap on a 56% discount and they become an absolute steal for any wireless headphone lover.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Sennheiser Momentum 4
media:content.media:text: Sennheiser Momentum 4
media:content.media:title: Sennheiser Momentum 4

item.title: I stay safe and protect my hearing with these Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 features
item.description: Wearing earbuds can be dangerous if you play your music too loud or lose awareness of your surroundings. These Pixel Buds Pro 2 features can help.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 in the Mint colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 in the Mint colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 in the Mint colorway.

item.title: Amazon is heavily discounting its Fire and Echo brand devices for the Big Spring Sale — here are the TOP 5 deals you simply can't miss
item.description: Whether you're interested in a Fire TV or an Echo Dot, there are a metric ton of Amazon discounts to check out this week.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The 2025 Amazon Echo series launch, featuring the new Dot Max and the latest Show 8 and Show 11.

item.title: Did you know that this Galaxy S26 Plus deal can basically score $100 worth of free accessories?
item.description: The Galaxy S26 Plus doesn't cost any less, but this Big Spring Sale deal will get you a free $100 gift card, which you can use towards accessories.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy A57 and A37 finally match flagships where it matters most

item.title: It's in the SongDNA: an 'immersive' Spotify test that lets you discover everyone involved
item.description: Spotify's Premium test, SongDNA, lets you crawl across a vast web of everyone involved in making your favorite track.

item.title: Rokid's AI Glasses Style are an affordable Meta Ray-Ban rival, and they just got a discount

item.title: Can you really get a FREE Galaxy S26 Ultra without trade at T-Mobile? Here's what you need to know about the viral deal

item.title: Tecno taps OpenClaw to supercharge its Ella AI assistant with new automation features
item.description: Tecno is integrating OpenClaw into its Ella AI assistant, bringing new automation capabilities such as message prioritization and summarization, multi-app integration, and more.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: EllaClaw on a Tecno phone
media:content.media:text: EllaClaw on a Tecno phone
media:content.media:title: EllaClaw on a Tecno phone
